FORMULA: The renal tubular reabsorption of chloride is useful for evaluating patients with hypochloremia and may be calculated as follows: Urine flow = volume in mL/ time in minutes = mL/min.; Glomerular Filtration Rate (GFR) = urine* x urine flow/plasma*; (* = creatinine or iothalamate); Clearance of Chloride (CCl) = urine Cl x urine flow/serum Cl; Free water clearance CH2O) = urine flow-(urine osmolality x urine flow/plasma osmolality); TRCl = (1- CCl ) x 100
